_comment: TradeSea / Lucid web trader. PLACEHOLDER selectors — calibrate against the live DOM before using (README 'Calibrating a selector pack'). TradeSea sends a login link by email; sign in once and the persistent browser profile keeps you logged in. Note the guide's warning: TradeSea can freeze on volatile opens and the stop may not display — set a manual stop platform-side.
name: tradesea
logged_in: CALIBRATE: selector present only when the chart is loaded
price: CALIBRATE: selector whose text is the live last price
position_size: CALIBRATE: selector whose text is your signed net position

cancel_by_price.selector: CALIBRATE: working-order row containing '$price' -> its cancel button
